commit 902ce0d2c57916a79b3c51750d3424276520363b
Author: Patrick Flynn <big.pat@gmail.com>
Date:   Thu May 21 07:02:37 2026 -0400

    workouts: use onChange for notes textarea to avoid per-keystroke writes
    
    onInput fired onLog (a DB write) on every keystroke, and the .trim() in
    setNotes stripped trailing spaces as the user typed — preventing a
    trailing space mid-word. In Preact, onChange fires on the native change
    event (on blur), so the write happens once when editing finishes.

 src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

commit 902ce0d2c57916a79b3c51750d3424276520363b
Author: Patrick Flynn <big.pat@gmail.com>
Date:   Thu May 21 07:02:37 2026 -0400

    workouts: use onChange for notes textarea to avoid per-keystroke writes
    
    onInput fired onLog (a DB write) on every keystroke, and the .trim() in
    setNotes stripped trailing spaces as the user typed — preventing a
    trailing space mid-word. In Preact, onChange fires on the native change
    event (on blur), so the write happens once when editing finishes.

diff --git a/src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx b/src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx
index b8b5673..6e84c7c 100644
--- a/src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx
+++ b/src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx
@@ -302,7 +302,7 @@ export function ExerciseCard({
               rows={2}
               placeholder="Notes (optional)"
               value={notes}
-              onInput={(e) => setNotes((e.target as HTMLTextAreaElement).value)}
+              onChange={(e) => setNotes((e.target as HTMLTextAreaElement).value)}
               data-testid={`notes-${index}`}
             />
           </>

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
workouts: address review feedback on weight input and inventory sanitizer

- Weight input now uses onChange (fires on blur) instead of onInput, matching
  the same pattern adopted for the notes textarea (902ce0d). Avoids an
  IndexedDB write per keystroke.
- sanitizeInventory uses Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call to check own
  keys on EQUIPMENT_CATALOG, avoiding false positives from inherited
  Object.prototype properties (toString, constructor, etc.) in untrusted
  imports.
- workouts test: press Tab to commit the weight value before clicking Done,
  matching the new onChange semantics.
EOF
)" && git push 2>&1 | tail -5

gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/85/comments/3326717442/replies -f body='Switched to Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(EQUIPMENT_CATALOG, key) so inherited Object.prototype properties (toString, constructor, etc.) cannot smuggle through sanitizeInventory.'

content.text:
Both review comments addressed and replies posted. Commit `3fcfa2c` pushed to PR #85:

- **ExerciseCard.tsx**: `onInput` → `onChange` on weight input (matches notes pattern in 902ce0d) to stop per-keystroke IndexedDB writes.
- **state.ts**: `key in EQUIPMENT_CATALOG` → `Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(...)` in `sanitizeInventory` to ignore inherited prototype keys from untrusted imports.
- **workouts.spec.ts**: added `press('Tab')` to commit the weight value before clicking Done, matching the new onChange semantics.

All 36 e2e tests pass; `npm run build` succeeds.

result:
Both review comments addressed and replies posted. Commit `3fcfa2c` pushed to PR #85:

- **ExerciseCard.tsx**: `onInput` → `onChange` on weight input (matches notes pattern in 902ce0d) to stop per-keystroke IndexedDB writes.
- **state.ts**: `key in EQUIPMENT_CATALOG` → `Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(...)` in `sanitizeInventory` to ignore inherited prototype keys from untrusted imports.
- **workouts.spec.ts**: added `press('Tab')` to commit the weight value before clicking Done, matching the new onChange semantics.

All 36 e2e tests pass; `npm run build` succeeds.
